title: matelea sucrensis
intro: Matelea sucrensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It is a tropical plant native to the Americas, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Matelea sucrensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
